content.full_text:
October 26, 2001

Ed Huber
780 Kearny Way
Napa, CA 94559

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. G-01-257

Dear Mr. Huber:

This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding the Napa Town & County Fair Board. Please be aware that the Commission has jurisdiction over the Political Reform Act (the "Act").1 The Commission does not advise on either the Public Records Act or the Freedom of Information Act. You may learn more about the Political Reform Act and the Commission on the Commission’s website: www.fppc.ca.gov. We have enclosed a copy of Government Code section 81008 for your information.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel

I:\AdviceLtrs\01-257
Attachment

1 Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
